Metadata.title: YICREDIT | Loans and Financing in France
Metadata.description: YICREDIT supports individuals and businesses in France with property loans, business financing, equipment financing, consumer loans and debt consolidation.

hero.headline: Loans in France, explained clearly
hero.subhead: Property loans, business financing, equipment loans, consumer credit and debt consolidation. YICREDIT helps you check options, prepare documents and speak with banks.

intro.title: Loan guidance for people and businesses in France
intro.body: We explain loan conditions, documents and steps in clear language.
intro.imageAlt: Paris business district and office buildings
intro.caption: Registered in Paris, serving local clients across France.

editorial.title: Understand the need, then find the right path

items.body: We help communicate with banks and lenders.

items.body: Startup, working capital and business growth.

items.title: Debt Consolidation
items.body: Combine debts and reduce monthly pressure.

items.title: Equipment and Projects
items.body: Purchase lists, quotations and business files.

assurance.title: Clear information, direct communication
assurance.body: From first contact to follow-up, we keep conditions, documents and progress easy to understand.

footer.license: COBSP registered with ORIAS no. 26008676 · RCS Paris 102 332 640
footer.note: Intermediary in banking operations, without handling client funds. Financing conditions and approvals are subject to the final decision of partner institutions.
